violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of orange and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Scheduled to be cleaned on 10/1. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Muffins and protein balls packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
